name: System Report
description: Tech news publication with in-depth analysis, expert commentary, and client-side privacy tools. Publishes original editorial content across AI, hardware, software, gaming, and policy beats. All tools run locally in the browser with zero data transmission.

supportedInterfaces.description: REST API returning all published articles as JSON
RSS 2.0 feed with full article content

skills.name: Article Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve tech news articles by keyword, tag, or category. Returns structured metadata including title, description, publication date, tags, hero image URL, and audio narration link.

skills.name: Get Latest News
skills.description: Retrieve the most recently published tech news articles. Useful for staying current on AI, hardware, software, gaming, and tech policy developments.

skills.name: EXIF Metadata Remover
skills.description: Strip GPS coordinates, camera model, timestamps, and other EXIF metadata from JPEG, PNG, and WebP images. Processing is 100% client-side — images never leave the browser.

skills.name: Market Data
skills.description: Get real-time market data including cryptocurrency prices (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE), stock indices (S&P 500, NASDAQ, Dow Jones), forex rates, and gold prices.
